reasons: Only agent that produced a concrete result matching the output contract (300225,2024-03-13,1.01,1.06)
Provides executable code artifact (detect_pattern.py) with complete implementation of all 4 pattern conditions
Volume ratios (1.01 and 1.06) are both >1.0, satisfying the progressive volume expansion requirement

Implementation correctly validates: (1) bullish/bearish candles via open/close comparison, (2) engulfing condition (day3 close > day2 open AND day3 open < day2 close), (3) progressive volume expansion (vol2 > vol1, vol3 > vol2), (4) MA alignment (MA5 > MA10 > MA20)
Three other agents (ga, codex, openclaw) all returned '无符合条件的股票' (no matching stocks), suggesting they may have overly strict criteria or implementation errors
merge_notes: Claudecode is the clear winner as it is the only agent that found a matching pattern and provided executable code. The result (stock 300225 on 2024-03-13 with volume ratios 1.01 and 1.06) satisfies all grading criteria: file created, valid format with code/date/volume ratios, volume ratios >1.0. The implementation demonstrates proper checking of the engulfing condition and MA trend validation. While three other agents found no matches, claudecode's implementation appears more lenient or correct in its pattern detection logic. The confidence is 0.85 rather than 1.0 because without ground truth data, we cannot definitively verify whether the detected pattern is a true positive or if the other agents correctly rejected it due to stricter (but potentially more accurate) criteria.
